headline: Assessing Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Valuation As Growth Portfolio Drives Revenue And Earnings Reset
summary: Why Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) is on investors’ radar today Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) continues to attract attention as a large US biopharmaceutical group with exposure to oncology, hematology and immunology, and a track record of selling complex therapies worldwide. headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Pipeline Update With New TYK2 And CELMoD Milestones
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) received U.S. FDA approval for Sotyktu (deucravacitinib) as the first TYK2 inhibitor for adults with active psoriatic arthritis. The company reported positive interim Phase 3 results for mezigdomide in relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. These updates add new depth to Bristol Myers Squibb’s immunology and oncology pipeline beyond previously discussed developments. For investors watching NYSE:BMY at a share price of $60.63, these two clinical milestones...
